title: Smoky Dense Slovakian Almond Cake
description: A sweet, proteinrich almond cake with a subtle smoky flavor, baked in a tandoor oven for the perfect postworkout treat.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor oven to 200°C (392°F). Grease a 20 cm (8‑inch) cake tin with coconut oil and line the bottom with parchment.
Combine almond flour, baking soda, cardamom, and a pinch of smoked sea salt in a mixing bowl.
Whisk eggs, honey, vanilla extract, and apple cider vinegar in a separate bowl until smooth.
Add almond butter to the wet mixture and whisk until fully incorporated.
Gradually fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, stirring until a thick batter forms. Do not overmix.
Pour batter into the prepared tin and tap gently to release air bubbles.
Bake in the tandoor for 30‑35 minutes or until golden and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove the cake, let cool in the tin for 10 min, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely before slicing.
